heading: Prohibition on international inspections of Department of Energy facilities unless protection of restricted data is certified
label: 6221 Prohibition on international inspections of Department of Energy facilities unless protection of restricted data is certified
text: The Secretary of Energy may not allow an inspection of a national security laboratory or nuclear weapons production facility by the International Atomic Energy Agency until the Secretary certifies to Congress that no Restricted Data will be revealed during such inspection.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6221 was renumbered .section 8286 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2651 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
